intro: This archive covers 11 cybercrime reports from mid-April 2026, with a clear focus on high-severity incidents. The financial services and e-commerce sectors were primary targets, alongside government entities and attacks affecting multiple industries. Geographically, activity centered on France and had a Global reach. The threat actors LockBit, Triad Nexus, and W3LL Team were prominently active during this period, driving a threat landscape where seven of the eleven documented events were classified as high severity.
